verdict: Early-stage repository with notable quality or readiness gaps.
top_risks: No tests were detected, which materially lowers trust in correctness and safe iteration.
No CI workflow was detected, so quality gates may rely on manual discipline.
Repository appears early in its delivery maturity and is not yet trustworthy for handoff.
top_fixes: Add a real test suite for core flows before trusting the repo more broadly.
Add CI to run lint/typecheck/tests on every change.
Strengthen delivery documentation and operational setup so the repo is easier to demo and hand off.
